mapper.select: -- SELECT a.dept_id, e.code, a.area_id, b.points, c.cal_method, c.cal_pron, -- c.type_value, c.type_name, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.is_inter_alarm -- FROM yz_radar_alarm_config a -- JOIN yz_radar_alarm_area b ON a.area_id = b.id -- JOIN yz_radar_alarm_type c ON a.type_id = c.id -- JOIN sys_dept d ON a.dept_id = d.dept_id -- JOIN ( -- SELECT dept_id, MAX(code) AS code -- FROM yz_radar_info -- GROUP BY dept_id -- ) e ON a.dept_id = e.dept_id -- WHERE a.is_enable = 1 SELECT a.dept_id, ri.code, a.area_id, b.points, c.cal_method, c.cal_pron, c.type_value, c.type_name, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.is_inter_alarm FROM yz_radar_alarm_config a JOIN yz_radar_alarm_area b ON a.area_id = b.id JOIN yz_radar_alarm_type c ON a.type_id = c.id JOIN sys_dept d ON a.dept_id = d.dept_id JOIN yz_radar_info ri ON a.dept_id = ri.dept_id WHERE a.is_enable = 1 ;
